patterns_recognized: D-grade dual-signal-against (SP edge against + PQI against) is directionally incorrect ~78% of the time in the 2026 archive — treat as 'expected wrong direction' and confirm the SKIP; relevant to TB@BAL, CIN@NYM, ARI@SF, MIA@TOR today.

HARD CAP 1 is directionally neutral but EV-protective: on 05-20 and 05-21, multiple HARD CAP 1 picks won directionally (ATL, LAD blowouts) but staking at model's inferior odds vs market 65-86% fair_prob would have been negative EV — enforce without exception.

OWNER-level BvP (10+ PA, shrunk OPS >= 0.85) is directionally predictive for large-margin wins — validated by ATL blowouts (Acuna + Albies OWNERs vs Alcantara on 05-20/05-21); PHI@SD today has Tatis + Machado as OWNERs vs Luzardo signaling SD structural edge.

C-grade GOLD CONFIRM requires SP xERA agrees with pick OR PQI >= +5 confirms pick (05-21 lesson from WSH@NYM loss); F3-alone with no SP or PQI qualification is a mandatory DOWNGRADE regardless of F3 magnitude.

Large f5_full_delta (>0.20) combined with PQI against the pick signals a self-contradicting bullpen-carry thesis — relevant to MIN@CHW (delta=0.2751, PQI=-15.9 against CHW) where CHW wins F5 at only 30.3% yet model picks CHW full-game.

CHC @ PIT.reasoning: Pre-cap conviction strong (score=5/A): SP edge 2.04 xERA agrees with CHC and PQI -28.2 strongly confirms — both qualifying conditions per the 05-21 CONFIRM rule (SP xERA agrees OR PQI >= +5 confirms). HARD CAPs 8+10 correctly demote to B- on marginal pick_prob (0.508) and below-band edge (+2.52pp). BvP shows Crow-Armstrong and Busch as WEAK_VS Mlodzinski (MEANINGFUL, soft negative) offset by Happ OWNER — 2-of-3 unfavorable is a soft signal not decisive enough to override the quantitative qualification. F1* thin and confidence_downgrade cap at low conviction; zero stake.
lessons_applied: 05-21-CONFIRM-rule: SP-xERA-agrees AND PQI-strongly-confirms both qualify
BvP 2-of-3 WEAK_VS is soft signal, not decisive override

TB @ BAL.reasoning: D-grade (-2) with dual signals against BAL: SP edge 0.66 xERA opposing BAL (McClanahan better than Bradish), PQI=-6.4 against BAL late-game profile, negative edge (-0.81pp). BvP reinforces: Yandy Diaz is OWNER vs Bradish (26 PA, shrunk 0.929) while Rutschman is WEAK_VS McClanahan. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0056 (BAL slightly worse high-leverage relief) adds secondary drag. Dual-signal-against D-grade pattern correct ~78% of the time — BAL direction likely wrong. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: dual-signal-against D-grade ~78% directional failure pattern
BvP Diaz OWNER vs Bradish + Rutschman WEAK_VS McClanahan reinforces wrong-direction call

MIN @ CHW.reasoning: f5_full_delta=0.2751 is a structural self-contradiction: CHW wins F5 at only 30.3% (MIN dominates F5) yet model picks CHW for the full game at 57.8% — a pure bullpen-carry thesis. PQI=-15.9 directly AGAINST CHW's late-game profile undermines the very thesis the full-game flip requires. F3_swing_take_gap is the sole F-signal with no SP quality confirmation. Per 05-18 lesson: F3 alone without corroborating SP edge or PQI is a mandatory DOWNGRADE. Downgrading to SKIP.
lessons_applied: extreme f5_full_delta=0.2751 + PQI against pick = self-contradicting bullpen-carry thesis
F3-alone without SP edge or PQI = mandatory DOWNGRADE per 05-18 lesson

STL @ MIL.reasoning: Pre-cap conviction strong (score=3 B+): F1_xera_gap=5.04 (Misiorowski dominant over Liberatore), PQI=+46.6 strongly confirms MIL, SP edge 3.36 xERA agrees. HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents staking at -19.29pp — market prices MIL at ~86.1% (fair_prob=0.8613) vs model's 66.83%. Staking at model's underpriced odds against the market's 86% estimate would be negative EV even on a direction win. Direction is sound; STL BvP vs Misiorowski shows weak collective output. Confirming direction; stake zero via HARD CAP 1.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 EV-protection honored — market at 86% vs model 67%; direction confirmed not stake
F1=5.04 + PQI=+46.6 strong directional conviction supports CONFIRM

NYY @ KC.reasoning: Three compounding flags: confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue + F1* thin sample (1.17 xERA gap only). NYY BvP vs Wacha is collectively mid-range: Judge MEANINGFUL (27 PA, shrunk 0.622) and Grisham SMALL_SAMPLE (shrunk 0.628) both below-average; NYY's lineup anchors are not exploiting KC's SP historically. Negative edge (-0.88pp) confirms market lacks confidence in NYY. Pattern from 05-20/05-21: NYY lost back-to-back to TOR in near-identical PLATINUM + HARD CAP 1 structure. Triple-flag + BvP weakness tips to DOWNGRADE.
lessons_applied: triple-flag stack: confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue + F1* thin = DOWNGRADE per 05-18 rule
NYY BvP mid-range vs Wacha (Judge shrunk 0.622) removes lineup quality argument

CIN @ NYM.reasoning: D-grade with SP edge 4.52 xERA against CIN (McLean >> Lodolo, small-sample SP at min_pa=67) and PQI=+49.1 strongly favoring NYM late-game — one of the most extreme PQI readings on today's slate. CIN top-5 BvP vs Lodolo is all NO_DATA, removing any lineup quality offset. Dual-signal-against D-grade pattern correct ~78% of the time: CIN direction is likely wrong. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: dual-signal-against D-grade: SP 4.52 xERA against + PQI=+49.1 against = ~78% failure pattern
all-NO_DATA BvP removes any lineup quality offset for CIN

ARI @ SF.reasoning: Worst-grade pick on the slate (D, -4): SP edge 5.38 xERA against ARI (Roupp >> Kelly), PQI=+42.5 favors SF late-game, f5_full_delta=0.3341 (SF wins F5 at 74.9% yet model inverts to ARI full-game — implausible bullpen thesis). BvP adds SF leverage: Arraez OWNER (18 PA, shrunk 0.905) and Chapman OWNER (12 PA, shrunk 0.789) vs Kelly — two collective SF OWNER-level BvP entries reinforce structural SF edge. confidence_downgrade=True + bullpen_fatigue compound ARI risk. SKIP is clearly correct.
lessons_applied: D-grade -4 triple-signal-against + 2 SF OWNERs in BvP vs Kelly confirms SKIP
extreme f5_full_delta=0.3341 = implausible bullpen-inversion thesis per 05-18/05-20 SF@ARI pattern

WSH @ CLE.reasoning: Pre-cap conviction exceptional (score=10/A): Bibee holds 3.87 xERA gap over Littell (dominant SP advantage), PQI=+39.9 strongly confirms CLE, F1+F5 bullpen gap both fire. HARD CAP 7 fires on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.014 — a near-zero gap at the minimum threshold. Ramirez is OWNER vs Littell (12 PA, shrunk 0.789), adding BvP directional support. PLATINUM historical 43% hit rate warrants tempered confidence, but SP dominance + PQI stack justify CONFIRM. Edge +4.32pp just above 4pp floor; low stake allocation appropriate.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 near-zero gap limits tier but does not negate score=10 SP + PQI conviction
Ramirez OWNER BvP vs opposing SP as directional booster
PLATINUM scrutiny applied: confidence held below 0.60

PHI @ SD.reasoning: SD has Tatis Jr. (OWNER, 12 PA, shrunk 0.829) and Machado (OWNER, 11 PA, shrunk 0.917 with 2 HRs in 11 PA) vs Luzardo — two collective OWNER-level BvP entries directly opposing PHI's away SP. Negative edge (-1.72pp) aligns with market preferring SD. PHI SP is small-sample (min_pa=75). bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade=True add compounding flags. Per 05-21 lesson: OWNER-level BvP for the opposing lineup is a meaningful qualitative signal. Two OWNERs + negative edge + confidence_downgrade = DOWNGRADE.
lessons_applied: 2 SD OWNER-level BvP vs PHI SP Luzardo = qualitative DOWNGRADE signal per 05-21 ATL blowout lesson
negative edge + confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue triple-flag stack

HOU @ TEX.reasoning: SP edge 1.30 xERA and PQI=+24.1 both agree with TEX direction; pre-cap B+ (score=3). HARD CAP 1 fires on barely-negative edge (-0.36pp); HARD CAP 10 would demote without CONFIRM. acute_roster stress flag warrants caution — potential lineup change not captured by the model. CONFIRM preserves TEX direction at B- effective grade per the three positive signals, acknowledging acute_roster as a late-lineup risk. No stake regardless (edge outside [4,15]pp band). Low conviction.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 10 CONFIRM-rescue: SP edge + PQI + Stage 1/2 agree = three positive signals warrant preserving direction
acute_roster flag as late-lineup caution — CONFIRM but note risk

MIA @ TOR.reasoning: D-grade with dual signals against MIA: TOR's Junk holds 1.99 xERA advantage over Yesavage (MIA), PQI=+30.5 confirms TOR late-game superiority. Market pricing is extreme — fair_prob=0.3843 means market prices MIA at only 38.4% vs model's 50.27%, a 12pp model blind-spot gap. pick_prob=0.5027 is essentially coin-flip; the market has materially more information than the model here. Dual-signal-against + extreme market gap confirms MIA direction very likely wrong. SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: dual-signal-against D-grade + extreme market gap (fair_prob=0.384 vs model 0.503) = model blind-spot confirmed
12pp market-model gap comparable to HARD CAP 1 logic: market information dominates

COL @ LAD.reasoning: Dual F-signal (F2_xwoba_gap=0.050, F3=11311.1 — largest F3 on today's slate) plus PQI=+18.0 confirm LAD lineup and SP quality. HARD CAP 1 (-12.54pp) correctly prevents staking — market at 79.4% (fair_prob=0.7937) vs model's 66.83%. Direction sound: same pattern as 05-20 LAD@SD (won 4-0 shutout) with near-identical HARD CAP 1 + dual F-signal structure. PLATINUM extra scrutiny applied (43% historical rate) — confidence held below 0.60. No BvP data to evaluate further.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 EV-protection: market at 79.4% vs model 67% = stake correctly zero; direction sound
05-20 LAD@SD directional parallel: HARD CAP 1 + dual F-signal won 4-0

SEA @ OAK.reasoning: F1_xera_gap=0.81* (thin-sample asterisk) is the sole F-signal — no F2/F3/PQI to corroborate. HARD CAP 5 correctly fires (F1* without lineup/PQI support cannot sustain GOLD). pqi_diff=1.9 (near zero) provides no late-game quality confirmation. SEA brings Luis Castillo — a proven established SP with robust Statcast profile — while OAK's Civale has a thin-sample data uncertainty. OAK bullpen marginally worse (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0038). Without F2/F3/PQI corroboration per HARD CAP 5 design, Castillo quality asymmetry supports SKIP over OAK.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 5: F1* sole signal without F2/F3/PQI = cannot sustain GOLD per design
Castillo proven quality vs Civale thin-sample = known SP asymmetry supports SKIP
